basics.name: GOTTUMUKKALA AMRUTHA
basics.title: M.B.A. - General Management 2026
basics.summary: M.B.A. candidate specializing in General Management with a strong foundation in Computer Science Engineering. Experienced in financial analysis, data visualization, and machine learning. Proven track record of academic excellence and leadership.

bullets: Prepared 5-year financial projections and CMA report for a 3 Cr restaurant loan, following RBI guidelines
Built Excel models to calculate IRR (18.5%), DSCR (1.46), and Payback Period (3.8 yrs) to test project viability
Performed sensitivity analysis and worked with the valuation team to include real-time land data
Assisted in client meetings and site visits, gathering inputs for revenue and cost assumptions
Gained end-to-end exposure to loan facilitation, documentation, and cross-functional coordination

experience.company: Santript - The Mess Committee of IIM Nagpur
bullets: Responsible for managing billing operations for over 600+ students, ensuring accuracy and efficiency
Conducted quality checks to ensure high food standards, supervising meal preparation and service for students

items: Secured 6th place among B.Tech CSE students demonstrating top academic performance
Attained 2nd rank in the 2nd semester with an aggregate SGPA of 9.54 in B.Tech CSE
Won 1st place in Light Vocal Solo at YUVAMRITAM'20, representing my team Jyothirmayi during my B.Tech
Achieved 3rd place in an Oratorical Competition held in my 2nd year of B.Tech CSE
Performance Evaluation of Movie-based Recommendation Systems using Hybrid Machine Learning Models
Presented at the 5th International Conference on Mobile Computing and Sustainable Informatics, ICMCSI 2024
Analyzed KNN, SVD, and hybrid models for accuracy and efficiency using the Netflix dataset
Demonstrated the Hybrid model's superiority and Matrix Factorization for personalized recommendations
Received a 75% scholarship throughout all four years of B.Tech CSE for consistently maintaining a CGPA above 7.5

projects.title: Movie Recommendation system using content-based and collaborative-based filtering
bullets: Developed a personalized movie recommendation system using content-based and collaborative filtering techniques
Utilized tools including Netflix dataset (100M+ ratings), Next.js, Vercel, Scipy, Flask, and PyTorch
Achieved superior recommendation accuracy with an RMSE of 1.0703 through descriptive analysis
Evaluated SVD, KNN, and XGBoost to identify the most accurate movie recommendation model
